MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Matthew Ball, Esq. 805-418-3100 Musick Peeler & Garrett LLP for Plaintiff.
Philip Yeager, Esq. 408-715-7984 Omnus Law for Defendant. (In-person)
Court reporter: Carly Tillotson, CSR #13627, 408-244-1900, production@talltys.com

Parties state appearance. The Court announces the tentative ruling. The Court states a timely notice of contest the TR was received.

ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Defendant and Cross-complainant Docent, LLC's Motion To Compel Plaintiff And Cross Defendant Merz Pharmaceuticals LLC's Compliance To Produce All Promised Responsive Documents Pursuant To CCP Section 2031.320.

Taken Under Submission.***

(as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
